EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} viewed node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view information about the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed data of traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed the settings of protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to view the settings of protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} viewed information about the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
